hero.subhead: Diseñador y desarrollador enfocado en interfaces elegantes y funcionales.

cta.body: ¿Listo para comenzar tu próximo proyecto? Colaboremos y hagamos realidad tus ideas.
cta.heading: Trabajemos Juntos

about.bioPara1: Creo experiencias digitales que combinan estética con funcionalidad. Especializado en diseño y desarrollo web, ayudo a las marcas a contar sus historias a través de un diseño reflexivo y centrado en el usuario.
about.bioPara2: Con experiencia en diseño y código, cierro la brecha entre la visión creativa y la ejecución técnica, asegurando que cada píxel tenga un propósito.
about.bioPara3: Cuando no estoy diseñando, me encontrarás explorando nuevas herramientas, contribuyendo a código abierto o compartiendo conocimiento con la comunidad.
about.heroSubtext: Diseñador, desarrollador y solucionador creativo de problemas en el ámbito digital.

availability.description: Abierto a proyectos freelance y oportunidades de tiempo completo.

hero.description: Una colección de trabajo reciente que abarca diseño, desarrollo y estrategia.

services.body: Trabajo con marcas para diseñar y construir productos digitales que resuelven problemas reales.
services.heading: Lo que ofrezco

featured-projects.title: Luminary
featured-projects.description: AI-powered content scheduling SaaS. Built the full-stack MVP in 8 weeks using Next.js, Prisma, and OpenAI. Reached 1,200 beta users before public launch.

featured-projects.title: Orbit Design System
featured-projects.description: A component library and token system adopted across 4 internal products at a Series B startup. Reduced UI inconsistencies by 70% and cut design-to-dev handoff time in half.
featured-projects.tags: React · Storybook · Figma Tokens · Tailwind CSS

featured-projects.title: TrailSync
featured-projects.description: A real-time GPS trail-tracking app for hikers with offline-first architecture. Handles 10k concurrent sessions with sub-200ms sync latency.

featured-projects.title: Folio CMS
featured-projects.description: A headless CMS built for creative agencies, featuring a drag-and-drop block editor and multi-tenant architecture. Deployed to 30+ agency clients.

skills.items: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Three.js
Node.js, Express, GraphQL, REST APIs, Prisma, tRPC
Vercel, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD
Figma, Storybook, Radix UI, Adobe Creative Suite
Vitest, Playwright, Jest, React Testing Library

project-filters.label: React
project-filters.description: Projects built with React or Next.js

projects-grid.title: Luminary
projects-grid.description: A real-time collaborative whiteboard app built with Next.js 14, Liveblocks, and Tailwind CSS. Supports multiplayer cursors, sticky notes, and shape drawing with sub-100ms sync.

projects-grid.title: Prism Design System
projects-grid.description: A comprehensive component library with 60+ accessible components, dark/light theming, and Storybook documentation. Adopted by three internal product teams within the first month.

projects-grid.title: Orbit Analytics
projects-grid.description: A SaaS dashboard for tracking product metrics with customisable widgets, CSV export, and role-based access control. Reduced reporting time by 40% for beta users.

projects-grid.title: Nocturne
projects-grid.description: A minimal Markdown-based note-taking app with local-first storage, end-to-end encryption, and a distraction-free writing mode. Built as a PWA with offline support.
projects-grid.technologies: React, IndexedDB, Web Crypto API, Vite

projects-grid.title: Threadline
projects-grid.description: An open-source CLI tool for generating structured git commit messages using conventional commits and AI-assisted suggestions. 1.2k stars on GitHub.

projects-grid.title: Folio
projects-grid.description: A drag-and-drop portfolio builder for designers, featuring live preview, custom domain support, and one-click Vercel deployment.
projects-grid.technologies: Next.js, Dnd-kit, Vercel API, Tailwind CSS

projects-grid.title: Halo UI Kit
projects-grid.description: A Figma component kit with 200+ components, auto-layout variants, and a paired Tailwind CSS token system. Downloaded 3,400+ times on the Figma Community.

projects-grid.title: Beacon
projects-grid.description: A lightweight, open-source feature-flag SDK for React with a dashboard UI, percentage rollouts, and A/B testing support. Zero runtime dependencies.

bio.highlight: 200,000+ users touched by products I've shipped
Contributor to open-source projects with 3,400+ GitHub stars
Speaker at JSConf and React Summit on performance optimization
Advocate for accessible, WCAG 2.1 AA-compliant interfaces

experience.description: Leading the developer experience team building Next.js-powered internal tooling; reduced CI pipeline time by 38% across 12 product squads.
Architected a real-time collaboration layer for a 3D design tool using WebSockets and CRDT; scaled from 0 to 80,000 monthly active users in 18 months.
Built and maintained component library used across Stripe Dashboard; improved Lighthouse accessibility score from 74 to 98 across core flows.
Prototyped a vector snapping algorithm that shipped in Figma 3.0; recognized as top intern project by the engineering org.
Graduated with honors; thesis on adaptive rendering strategies for low-bandwidth environments.

skills-detailed.items: React 18, Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Radix UI, Zustand
Node.js, Express, tRPC, GraphQL, REST API design, WebSockets, Prisma ORM
Vercel, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, CloudFront), Docker, GitHub Actions, Terraform
Figma, Adobe Illustrator, Framer, design systems, component documentation
Vitest, Playwright, Jest, React Testing Library, Storybook, Chromatic
Core Web Vitals optimization, bundle analysis, edge caching strategies, lazy loading
Technical writing, async-first communication, cross-functional collaboration, mentorship
